_meta.source: Clinical communication research — validated across all 10 disorders
_meta.purpose: Phrase filtering for voice interview and NPC dialogue generation

universal_safe.phrase: Your feelings are valid. I'm here to listen.
It doesn't matter how long it's been. You deserve support now.
Thank you for trusting me with this.
Are you looking for input right now, or would you rather I just listen?
I know things are really hard right now. You don't have to go through this alone.
I may not know exactly what you're going through, but I want to understand.
That sounds like it's been really heavy to carry.
What's that been like for you?
There's no pressure to go anywhere you don't want to go in this story.
Your character gets to set the pace.
Take your time. There's no rush in this world.
Your character can pause here as long as they need.
Even small steps count in this world.

universal_harmful.why_harmful: Implies anxiety is a controllable choice.
universal_harmful.say_instead: It makes sense your mind is working overtime right now.
Your feelings make sense, even if the situation is hard to read from the outside.

universal_harmful.phrase: I know exactly how you feel.
universal_harmful.say_instead: Keep the focus on them; reflect their emotion.

universal_harmful.phrase: Have you tried just being positive?
universal_harmful.say_instead: What's one small thing that used to bring you even a little relief?

universal_harmful.phrase: You have so much to be grateful for.
universal_harmful.why_harmful: Induces guilt; depression is not about lacking gratitude.
universal_harmful.say_instead: I hear that despite what you have, things feel really difficult.
What gets in the way when you try to...?

universal_harmful.why_harmful: Creates social pressure to appear fine.
universal_harmful.say_instead: How are things going for you today -- really?
I can only imagine how painful that was.

universal_harmful.why_harmful: Shame-inducing for those who feel they can't be vulnerable.
universal_harmful.say_instead: It makes sense you're feeling exhausted by all of this.

universal_harmful.phrase: You need to see a therapist / take medication.
universal_harmful.say_instead: Let the therapist guide this; if urgent, provide resource gently.
It takes time to work through what happened. You don't have to rush.
